products.description:
Yuji Itadori, from "Jujutsu Kaisen," joins FiguartsZERO! This fixed-pose figure captures the moment he releases his devastating Black Flash attack, using translucent parts to accentuate the drama!

products.name: Star Wars Meisho Movie Realization Action Figure Ronin Jango Fett 17 cm
products.description: Timed for the upcoming new Star Wars film come three consecutive new releases in the MEISHO MOVIE REALIZATION series! The first is Ronin Jango Fett. Includes his trademark pair of guns, which can be attached to his legs. Includes 8 optional pairs of hands, two guns, and a kunai blade.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure SSJ 3 Son Goku 16 cm
products.description: Five years after being offered as a web exclusive, Super Saiyan 3 Son Goku joins S.H.Figurarts with an all new sculpt and tons of new features! It looks great when displayed with the Tamashii EFFECT Energy Aura Yellow Ver. (sold separately). The highly posable figure includes five pairs of optional hands, three optional expressions, and a custom stand.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Son Gohan (Battle Clothes) 10 cm
products.description:
SON GOHAN -BATTLE CLOTHES- from "Dragon Ball Z," joins S.H.Figuarts. Features four expression options, including shouting, grimacing, laughing, and straight-face. Optional hair parts let you replicate his dynamic hairstyle. Also, continuing the tradition started with the S.H.
Figuarts portrayals of Dodoria and Zarbon (sold separately), it comes with a glowing Namekian Dragon Ball (three star)!

Set Contents: Main body, Four optional expression parts, Three left and four right optional hands, Optional hair parts, Optional chest parts,
Glowing Namekian Dragon Ball (three star)

products.name: Godzilla S.H. MonsterArts Action Figure Godzilla 2023 1.0 16 cm
products.description:
Godzilla Series From the latest "Godzilla-1.0", GODZILLA [2023] appears on S.H.MonsterArts! Based on the 3D data used in the film, Yuji Sakai sculpted, colored, and produced the figure. The figure was also directly supervised by director Takashi Yamazaki to reproduce Godzilla as he appeared in the film!

Set Contents: Main Body

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Zarbon 16 cm
products.description:
Zarbon from "Dragon Ball Z" joins S.H.Figuarts! Includes glaring, shouting, and grimacing expression options, which in concert with removable ears and Scouter let you re-create your favorite scenes. It also includes a Namekian Dragon Ball (two-star version)!

Set Contents: Main Body, Three right and two left optional hands, Three optional expressions, Scouter, Hair option for Scouter, Optional hair part, Namekian Dragon Ball (two star)

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H.Figuarts Action Figure Set Porunga & Dende -Come Forth, Genuine Shenron!!- 42 cm
products.description:
PORUNGA & DENDE LUMINOUS DRAGON BALL SET, as seen in "Dragon Ball Z," joins S.H.Figuarts! Porunga's titanic size s accentuated by dramatic posability and optional hands that let you re-create your favorite scenes! And an optional head and hands for Dende let you capture his summoning pose! The sculpting, colors, and posability of S.H.Figuarts combine with the sounds and light-up in this amazing set. An NFC reader is built into the stand, and Porugna and Dende are tagged with chips. Place Dende atop the stand and the seven Dragon Balls illuminate, re-creating the dramatic scene of his summoning! And the set includes many recorded lines from both characters that you can play back as well.

Set Contents: Porunga figure, One ogtional left hand and two optional right hands for Porunga, Dende figure, Set of optional hands for Dende, Optional head for Dende, Namekian Dragon Balls (1-7 star versions), Porunga Stand, Dragon Ball Stand, Type-3 Batteries (Sold Separately)

Total height: 42 cm
(with stand and crest),
Height: 28 cm(with stand)

products.description:
Son Goku, as seen in the space survival arc of "Dragon Ball Super," joins S.H.Figuarts! Now you can hold the power of Son Goku "Ultra Instinct" in the palm of your hand! The set includes three optional expressions, three pairs of optional hands, a ball effect, and seven light beam effects.

It stands approx. 14 cm tall and comes in a window box.

products.description:
King Cold, from "Dragon Ball Z," joins S.H.Figuarts! Sculpted at a titanic 220mm size that's in scale with his appearance from the series, it features all of the articulation you've to expect from S.HFiguarts toy technology. Three optional expressions are included, letting you display with a scream, grimace, or sneer! Also includes an all new throne accessory. Use it with the S.H.Figuarts Mecha Frieza (sold separately) to re-create your favorite scenes!

- Main Body
- Three pairs of optional hands
- Optional head·Three optional expressions
- Crossed arm part
- Trunks' sword
- Throne
- Optional cape

products.description: Welcome the fierce battles of Dragon Ball into your world with these superior 6.5-inch Dragon Stars action figures. You can be the star of your own Dragon Ball battles, inspired by the show and limited only by your imagination.

products.name: Dragon Ball Super: Broly Action Figure S.H. Figuarts Vegeta Super Saiyan Blue (15th Anniversary Version) 14cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Super: Broly Action Figure of Vegeta Super Saiyan Blue in S.H. Figuarts collection, size approx.14cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

Celebrating 15 years of S.H. Figuarts! SUPER SAIYAN GOD SUPER SAIYAN VEGETA - SUPER join the series in a special S.H.Figuarts 15th anniversary version! Featuring all the play value fans have come to expect from the series, it also lets you replicate "god mode!" More, it includes a special stand and packaging sleeve commemorating the 15th anniversary of the line.

Content :

  • Main Body
  • Two optional heads (SUPER SAIYAN GOD SUPER SAIYAN Version)
  • An optional head(SUPER SAIYAN GOD version)
  • Four right and three left optional hands
  • Optional crossed arms
  • S.H.Figuarts 15th Anniversary Stand

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Figure Figuarts ZERO Janenba (Janemba) (Extra Battle) 30cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Figure of Janenba in FiguartsZERO (Extra Battle) collection, size approx.30cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

"DRAGON BALL Z Fusion Reborn" was created in 1995 to mark the 15th anniversary of the series. Now the monstrous antagonist JANENBA joins the FiguartsZERO series! The statue is sculpted to capture a dramatic moment, with fine detailing and translucent accent parts!

Content :

  • Main Body(with stand)
  • Sword

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Super Saiyan 2 Son Goku Event Exclusive 13cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Action Figure of Super Saiyan 2 Son Goku in S.H. Figuarts collection, size approx.13cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

Reproduce his dogi clothes torn in the battle with Yakon in the anime series!

Also included are three facial expression parts, with a shouting face and clenched face in addition to the impressive grinning face!

On top of that, you could reproduce the electric shock effect specific to the Super Saiyan 2 state using the newly modeled effect parts included!

Content :

  • Main body
  • Exchangeable hand left/right x 4 types
  • Exchangeable expression parts x 3 types
  • Angel Halo part
  • Effect parts

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Action Figure of Shenron in S.H. Figuarts collection, size approx.28cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

Shenron from "Dragon Ball Z" is brought to you in a pearly coloring to reflect the scene where he is summoned from the Dragon Balls, in this exclusive SDCC 2022 edition!

  • Main body
  • Dragon Ball Effect
  • Dedicated pedestal set

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Android 19 13 cm
products.description:
Android 19 from "Dragon Ball Z" joins S.H.Figuarts! Optional expressions let you capture his early appearances with a "right glance" expression part, plus shouting, smirking, and frightened faces. In combination with a optional head without hat, you can replicate all sorts of scenes! Other accessories include a variety of optional hands and a broken arm option. And it even includes a bonus option expression for the S.H.Figuarts SUPER SAIYAN VEGETA -AWAKENED SUPER SAIYAN BLOOD- figure (sold separately)!

Set CententMain Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Four optional expressions, Optional pair of arms, Optional head, Bonus option expression for the S.H.Figuarts SUPER SAIYAN VEGETA -AWAKENED SUPER SAIYAN BLOOD- figure(sold separately)

products.name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Orange Piccolo 19 cm
products.description:
ORANGE PICCOLO, from "DRAGON BALL SUPER: SUPER HERO," joins S.H.Figuarts! The sculpting is exquisite, from his musculature down to the ripples in his clothing, capturing his on-screen image with flair! Multiple optional expression parts are included, such as his scream during the face-off against Cell Max. Just as with the S.H.Figuarts SON GOHAN BEAST(sold separately), his gi uses flexible material for high posability! And the set also includes an extra "Kamehameha" effect for the S.H.Figuarts ULTIMATE GOHAN SUPER HERO!

Set Contents: Main Body, Two pairs of optional hands, Three optional expressions [Bonus Part]"Kamehameha" effect for the S.H.Figuarts ULTIMATE GOHAN SUPER HERO

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Super Saiyan Trunks (The Boy From The Future) 14 cm
products.description: From "Dragon Ball Z," Super Saiyan Vegeta (Awakened Super Saiyan Blood) joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring dramatic colors that evoke his on-screen appearance, plus numerous option parts that let you re-create favorite scenes. Set Contents: Main Body, Two optional expressions, Three left and four right optional hands, Crossed arm part Please note: Due to the small edition size and the great demand for this item, allocations are possible.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Statue Figuarts ZERO (Extra Battle) Super Saiyan Trunks The second Super Saiyan 28cm (New)
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z statue of Super Saiyan Trunks in Figuarts ZERO (Extra Battle) collection, size approx.28cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

"Goku isn't the only Super Saiyan! There's another one right here!"

The second Super Saiyan from "Dragon Ball Z," Super Saiyan Trunks, joins the FiguartsZERO EXTRA BATTLE series! This fixed-pose figure captures the climactic moment of Trunks' battle with Mecha Frieza, complete with both slashing effect and Mecha Frieza's severed body rendered in three dimensions!

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Krillin (Battle Clothes) 11 cm
products.description:
From "Dragon Ball Z," Krillin in Battle Clothes joins S.H.Figuarts! It includes four optional expressions: grimacing, shouting, injured, straight face. Use them with optional stomach and back parts to re-create dramatic damage from his fight with the second form of Frieza! Following the tradition set by the S.H.Figuarts Dodoria and Zarbon (both sold separately), it also includes a glowing Namekian Dragon Ball (one star)!

Set Contents:

Main Body, Four pairs of optional hands, Four optional expression parts, Optional chest part, Optional stomach part, Optional back part, Glowing Namekian Dragon Ball (one star)

products.name: Dragon Ball Z FiguartsZERO PVC Statue (Extra Battle) Super Saiyan Son Goku -Are You Talking About Krillin?!!!!!- 27 cm
products.description:
"Are you talking about Krillin? Don't you dare talk about Krillin!" Super Saiyan Son Goku from Dragon Ball Z vents his fury at Frieza in this dramatically sculpted FiguartsZERO (EXTRA BATTLE) release! The base is rendered in realistic-looking magma and rough seas from Planet Namek.

Set Contents: Main body with stand (includes effect parts)

products.name: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Vegeta 14 cm
products.description:
Vegeta as seen in the upcoming 2022 film "DRAGON BALL SUPER : SUPER HERO" joins S.H.Figuarts, with all new sculpting to match his new on-screen appearance!

Set Contents: Main Body, Three optional expression parts, Three left and four right optional hands

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Krillin Earth's Strongest Man 12 cm
products.description:
From "Dragon Ball Z," the Earth's strongest man Krillin joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring all-new sculpting and articulation to better capture his dynamic on-screen appearance, this ABS and PVC figure is one fans will not want to miss!

Set Contents: Main Body, Six left and five right optional hands, Three optional heads, Slicing effect

products.name: Dragon Ball Super S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Android 17 (Universe Survival Saga) 14 cm
products.description:
From the Universe Survival Saga of "Dragon Ball Super," the mighty Android 17 joins S.H.Figuarts! Standing 135mm tall and made of ABS and PVC plastic, you can display it in dynamic poses with the many included options and effect parts. Or display alongside the S.H.Figuarts Android 18 -Universe Survival Saga- figure (sold separately) to re-create dramatic scenes from on screen!

Set Contents:

- Main Body
- Four pairs of optional hands
- Three optional expression parts
- Optional hair part
- Energy bomb effect
- Attack effect

products.name: Dragonball GT S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Super Saiyan 4 Son Goku 15 cm
products.description:
Super Saiyan 4 Son Goku from "Dragon Ball GT" joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring new shoulder articulation, it can even take the 10x Kamehameha power-up and release poses with ease! Optional expressions and hands let you re-create all sorts of dynamic scenes.

Set Contents: Main Body, Three optional expression parts, Five pairs of optional hands, 10x Kamehameha Effect

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure 2-Pack Tenshinhan & Chaoz
products.description:
From DRAGON BALL Z, Tenshinhan and Chaoz join S.H.Figuarts! Tenshinhan includes three optional faces for shouting, clenching and sweating, and the set includes a posable Chaoz figure too!

Set Contents: Tenshinhan figure, Three optional expressions for Tenshinhan, Four right and three left optional hands for Tenshinhan, Chaoz figure, Two pairs of optional hands for Chaoz

Size Tenshinhan: approx. 16 cm
Size Chaoz: approx. 8 cm

products.name: Dragon Ball Z FiguartsZERO PVC Statue (Extra Battle) Super Saiyan 3 Son Goku 21 cm
products.description:
SUPER SAIYAN 3 SON GOKU -Dragon fist explosion- joins Figuarts ZERO! Sculpted to capture Goku's epic Dragon Fist scene from the film, "Dragon Ball Z: Dragon Fist Explosion!! If Goku Can't Do It, Who Will?". Meticulously colored to evoke the drama of him defeating his foe in the climax of the film, this display piece practically overflows with energy!
